Part.Source:
retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &versao = RetornaVersaoNotas.Udp(VersaoNota.VersaoCTe) &CTeChv = 'CTe' ValidatributoServicoCte.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod)
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon151_EmiteNfeMesRetroativo, &TCon151_EmiteNfeMesRetroativo) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon084_ImpostoAproximado, &TCon084_ImpostoAproximado)
RetornaCOnfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs, &TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs)
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
&CteNum = CteNum &CteSer = CteSer
If &CteNum = 0 and CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando If CteModCod = '57' &CteNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTENUM, EmpCod, FilCod) &CteSer = RetornaSerieNF.Udp(domParCod.CTESER, EmpCod, FilCod) &ParCod = domParCod.CTENUM Do 'atualizaPARMempresa' Else &CteNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTENUMOS, EmpCod, FilCod) &CteSer = RetornaSerieNF.Udp(domParCod.CTESEROS, EmpCod, FilCod) &ParCod = domParCod.CTENUMOS Do 'atualizaPARMempresa' EndIf
CteNum = &CteNum CteSer = &CteSer EndIf
If Month(CteDtaEms) <> Month(ServerDate()) and &TCon151_EmiteNfeMesRetroativo <> 'S' and CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando // Emite Nfe Mes Retroativo? Padrao = N CteDtaEms = ServerDate() EndIf //################################################## //MONTA A CHAVE DO CTE // cUF - Código da UF do emitente do Documento Fiscal //· AAMM - Ano e Mês de emissão do CT-e //· CNPJ - CNPJ do emitente //· mod - Modelo do Documento Fiscal //· serie - Série do Documento Fiscal //· nCT - Número do Documento Fiscal //· tpEmis – Forma de emissão do CT-e //· cCT - Código Numérico que compõe a Chave de Acesso //· cDV - Dígito Verificador da Chave de Acesso
&tpAmb = FilAmbEms.ToString() &tpEmis = FilTipEms.ToString() &cUF = RetornaCodigoSiglaEstado.Udp(0, FilCidUfeCod) &CNPJ = TRIM(retornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCpj)) &cNF = PadL(trim(str(&CteNum)), 8, '0') &dEmi = CteDtaEms &AAMM = padL(SubStr(LTrim(str(Year(&dEmi), 4, 0)), 3, 2), 2, '0') + padL(LTrim(str(Month(&dEmi), 2, 0)), 2, '0')
//Calculando o DV pelo modulo11 &aux = PadL(&cUF, 2, '0') + PadL(&AAMM, 4, '0') + PadL(&CNPJ, 14, '0') + PadL(CteModCod, 2, '0') + PadL(&CteSer.ToString().Trim(), 3, '0') + PadL(&CteNum.ToString().Trim(), 9, '0') + PadL(FilTipEms, 1, '0') + PadL(&cNF, 8, '0') &cDV = RetornaModulo11.Udp(&aux)
//CHAVE DA CTE &CteChv = PadL(&cUF, 2, '0') + PadL(&AAMM, 4, '0') + PadL(&CNPJ, 14, '0') + PadL(CteModCod, 2, '0') + PadL(&CteSer.ToString().Trim(), 3, '0') + PadL(&CteNum.ToString().Trim(), 9, '0') + PadL(FilTipEms, 1, '0') + PadL(&cNF, 8, '0') + PadL(&cDV, 1, '0')
If &Transmitir = 'S' //GERA ARQUIVO XML NA PASTA ENVIO &ArquivoEnvio.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFenvio + &CTeChv.Trim() + '-cte.xml' If &ArquivoEnvio.Exists() &ArquivoEnvio.Delete() EndIf &Nome_enviar = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFenvio.Trim() + trim(&CTeChv) + '-cte.xml' EndIf
If CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao // manter essa verssão 3.0 para alguns casos pois na versão 4.0 não existe mais anulação &versao = '3.00' EndIf
&ArqCte.Open(&Nome_enviar) // Abrir o arquivo XML &ArqCte.WriteStartDocument('UTF-8') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('CTe') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xmlns','http://www.portalfiscal.inf.br/cte') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCte') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('versao',&versao) &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('Id','CTe'+&CteChv) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ide') &ArqCte.WriteElement('cUF',SubStr(trim(str(FilCidUfeIbge)),1,2)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cCT',padl(trim(str(&CteNum)),8,'0')) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CFOP',trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteCfop))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('natOp',SubStr(trim(CteNatOpe),1,60)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('mod',CteModCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('serie',&CteSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nCT',&CteNum) &Hoje = CteDtaEms &soNumero = str(year(&Hoje),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(&Hoje),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(&Hoje),2,0)),2,'0') +'T'+trim(CteHorEms) +'-'+ trim(FilFusHor) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dhEmi',&soNumero) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpImp','1') // 1-Retrato 2 -Paisagem &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpEmis',FilTipEms) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cDV',&cDV) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpAmb',FilAmbEms) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpCTe',CteFinEms) &ArqCte.WriteElement('procEmi',TProcEmi.AppContribuinte) &VerProc = RetornaVersaoNotas.Udp(VersaoNota.VersaoCTe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('verProc',&VerProc) If CteindGlo = true &ArqCte.WriteElement('indGlobalizado',1) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunEnv',FilCidUfeIbge) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunEnv',trim(FilCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFEnv',FilCidUfeCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('modal',CteMod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpServ',CteTipSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunIni',CteIniCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunIni',trim(CteIniCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFIni',CteIniUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMunFim',CteTerCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMunFim',trim(CteTerCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UFFim',CteTerUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('retira',CteIndRec) If CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Sim &ArqCte.WriteElement('xDetRetira',CteIndRecDes) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('indIEToma',CtePapTom) If CteTomSer <> Tomador.Outros//TOMADOR &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('toma3') ///Indicador do "papel" do tomador do serviço no CT-e &ArqCte.WriteElement('toma',CteTomSer) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//toma03 Else &GetCteTomCod = CteTomCod Do 'GetOutroTomador' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('toma4') //Indicador do "papel" do tomador do serviço no CT-e &ArqCte.WriteElement('toma',CteTomSer) If not &TomPesCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',trim(&TomPesCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',trim(&TomPesInsEst)) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',&TomPesCpf) If not &TomPesInsEst.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',trim(&TomPesInsEst)) EndIf EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(&TomPesRaz)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xFant',trim(&TomPesFan)) If not &TomPesFonNum.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',&TomPesFonNum) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderToma') /// abriu &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(&TomPesLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(&TomPesNro)) if not &TomPesCpl.trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(&TomPesCpl)) EndIF
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(&TomPesBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',&TomPesCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(&TomPesCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',&TomPesCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',&TomPesCidUfeCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',&TomPesCidPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',&TomPesCidPaiNom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderToma &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //toma04 //Indicador do "papel" do tomador do serviço no CT-e EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ide //############################################# &compl = 0 If Not CteDadAdiSer.Trim().IsEmpty() or Not CteDadAdiTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('compl') &compl = 1 EndIf
If Not CteDadAdiTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCaracAd',CteDadAdiTra) EndIf
If Not CteDadAdiSer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCaracSer',CteDadAdiSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xEmi',CteEmiFunCod) EndIf
&CteObsGer.SetEmpty() &CteObsGer = CteObsAut.Trim() +' '+ CteObsGer.Trim() If CteImpVlrTotTri > 0 and (&TCon084_ImpostoAproximado <> 'N') &CteObsGer += ' LEI 12.741/12, VALOR APROX.TRIB:R$' + trim(toformattedString(CteImpVlrTotTri)) + ' (' + trim(ToformattedString(CteImpAliTotTri)) + '%)'+ ' FONTE:IBPT' EndIf
If &compl = 0 and not &CteObsGer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('compl') &compl = 1 EndIf
If not &CteObsGer.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xObs',Trim(&CteObsGer)) EndIf
If not CteAveCodLim.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','CODLIM') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteAveCodLim)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteAveRam.Trim().IsEmpty() and CteAveRam <> RamoAverbacao.Maior // não é vazio e vai especificar o ramo. quando noa especificado pega automatico o de maior cobertura &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','RAMO') Do Case Case CteAveRam = RamoAverbacao.RCTRC &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto','RCTRC') Case CteAveRam = RamoAverbacao.RCAC &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto','RCAC') Case CteAveRam = RamoAverbacao.RCTAC &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto','RCTAC') Case CteAveRam = RamoAverbacao.RCTAMB &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto','RCTAMB') Case CteAveRam = RamoAverbacao.TRAMB &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto','TRAMB') EndCase
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CtePlcTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','PLACA') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CtePlcTra)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CtePlc.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','REBOQUE') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CtePlc)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteNroCon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','CONTAINER') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteNroCon)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteVlrCon.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','ValorContainer') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto', strReplace(strReplace(trim(toFormattedString(CteVlrCon)),".",''),",",".")) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteVlrAva.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','ValorAvarias') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',strReplace(strReplace(trim(toFormattedString(CteVlrAva)),".",''),",",".")) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteVlrAce.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','ValorAcessorio') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',strReplace(strReplace(trim(toFormattedString(CteVlrAce)),".",''),",",".")) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteDocTra.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','DOCUMENTO TRANSPORTE') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteDocTra)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteCiotNro.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','CIOT') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteCiotNro)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteCpfMot.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','CPF MOTORISTA') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteCpfMot)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If not CteNomMot.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ObsCont') &ArqCte.WriteAttribute('xCampo','NOME MOTORISTA') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xTexto',trim(CteNomMot)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ObsCont Endif
If &compl = 1 //é pq abriu &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //compl EndIf
Do 'GetFilial' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('emit') //EMITENTE If &FilCpj.Trim().Length() > 11 &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilCpj) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',&FilCpj) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',&FilInsEst)
//###########################Inscrição Estadual do Substituto Tributário For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FilUfeCodST Where FilUfeCodST = CteTerUfe if not FilUfeInsST.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('IEST',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilUfeInsST))//Inscrição Estadual do Substituto Tributário endif Exit EndFor //#######################################################################
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(&FilRaz)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xFant',trim(&FilFan)) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderEmit') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(&FilLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(&FilNro)) If not &FilCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(&FilCpl)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(&FilBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',trim(&FilCidCod)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(&FilCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',&FilCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',&FilCidUfeCod) If not &FilFonNum.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(&FilFonNum)) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderEmit
RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.call(EmpCod, FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &TbImpUfeCod)
&ArqCte.WriteElement('CRT', &FilRegTrib) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//emit
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('rem') //REMETENTE
if CteRemUfe = 'EX' //EXPORTACAO &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ','00000000000000') Else If not CteRemCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteRemCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteRemIns) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteRemCpf)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteRemIns) EndIf EndIf
If FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome','CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteRemRaz)) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('xFant',trim(CteRemFan)) If not CteRemFon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(CteRemFon)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderReme') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(CteRemLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(CteRemNro)) If not CteRemCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(CteRemCpl)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(CteRemBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',CteRemCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(CteRemCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',CteRemCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteRemUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',CteRemPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',trim(CteRemPaiNom)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderReme If not CteRemEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(CteRemEml)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//rem
If CteExpCod <> 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('exped') //EXPEDIDOR If Not CteExpCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteExpCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteExpIns) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteExpCpf)) If not CteExpIns.Trim().IsEmpty() and CteExpIns <> 'ISENTO' &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteExpIns) EndIf EndIf
If FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome','CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteExpRaz)) EndIf
If not CteExpFon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(CteExpFon)) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderExped') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(CteExpLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(CteExpNro)) If Not CteExpCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(CteExpCpl)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(CteExpBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',CteExpCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(CteExpCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',CteExpCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteExpUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',CteExpPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',trim(CteExpPaiNom)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderExped If not CteExpEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(CteExpEml)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//exped EndIf
If CteRecCod <> 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('receb') //RECEBEDOR If not CteRecCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteRecCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteRecIns) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteRecCpf)) If not CteRecIns.Trim().IsEmpty() and CteRecIns <> 'ISENTO' &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteRecIns) EndIf EndIf
If FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome','CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteRecRaz)) EndIf If not CteRecFon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(CteRecFon)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderReceb') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(CteRecLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(CteRecNro)) If not CteRecCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(CteRecCpl)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(CteRecBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',CteRecCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(CteRecCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',CteRecCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteRecUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',CteRecPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',CteRecPaiNom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//enderReceb If not CteRecEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(CteRecEml)) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//receb EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('dest') //DESTINATARIO If CteDesUfe = 'EX' &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ','00000000000000') Else If not CteDesCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDesCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteDesIns) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDesCpf)) If not CteDesIns.Trim().IsEmpty() and CteDesIns <> 'ISENTO' &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteDesIns) EndIf EndIf EndIf
If FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome','CT-E EMITIDO EM AMBIENTE DE HOMOLOGACAO - SEM VALOR FISCAL') Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteDesRaz)) EndIf If not CteDesFon.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(CteDesFon)) EndIf If not CteDesSuf.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('ISUF',CteDesSuf) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('enderDest') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xLgr',trim(CteDesLog)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nro',trim(CteDesNro)) If not CteDesCpl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xCpl',trim(CteDesCpl)) EndiF &ArqCte.WriteElement('xBairro',trim(CteDesBai)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cMun',CteDesCidCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xMun',trim(CteDesCidNom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('CEP',CteDesCep) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteDesUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cPais',CteDesPaiCod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xPais',CteDesPaiNom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() If not CteDesEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(CteDesEml)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('vPrest') //PRESTAÇÃO &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTPrest',CteVlrTotPreSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vRec',CteVlrRecSer) If CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Sim For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CtePreCod If CteVlrPreCom > 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('Comp') &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteNomPreCom)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vComp',CteVlrPreCom) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() EndIf EndFor EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('imp') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS') //Informações relativas aos Impostos Do Case Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal //'00' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS00') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida // '20' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS20') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBC',CteImpPerRed) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
// '40' '41' '51' Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento or CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.NaoTributada or CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Deferido &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS45') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao //60 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS60') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCSTRet',CteImpVbcRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSSTRet',CteImpVstRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSSTRet',CteImpAliRet) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCred',CteImpVlrCre) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.outros //90 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMS90') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',CteImpCst) If CteImpPerRed > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBC',CteImpPerRed) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMS',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteImpVlr) If CteImpVlrCre >0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCred',CteImpVlrCre) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.OutraUF //90 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMSOutraUF') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST','90') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedBCOutraUF',CteImpPerRed) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCOutraUF',CteImpVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSOutraUF',CteImpAli) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSOutraUF',CteImpVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() Case CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples //90
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMSSN') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST','90') If CteConSplNac = Status_SimNao.Sim &ArqCte.WriteElement('indSN',1) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()
EndCase &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ICMS
If CteImpVlrTotTri > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTotTrib',CteImpVlrTotTri) EndIf
If not CteImpObsFis.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('infAdFisco',CteImpObsFis) EndIf
// Se Tipo do CT-e= 0 (Normal), 3 (Substituição) ou 1 (Complemento de // Valores) na Operação interestadual com Tipo de Serviço Normal, // Destinatário não contribuinte (tag IE do destinatário não informada) e // Tomador diferente de remetente e não contribuinte (indIEToma=9) // Grupo de informações da partilha do ICMS com a UF de fim da prestação deve estar preenchido &Varchar = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDesIns)
If (CteIniUfe <> CteTerUfe and &Varchar.IsEmpty() AND CtePapTom = PapelTomador.NaoContribuinte and CteTomSer <> Tomador.Remetente) and (CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Normal or CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao or CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('ICMSUFFim') &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCUFFim', CteImpVbc) // Valor da BC do ICMS na UF de término da prestação do serviço de transporte &ArqCte.WriteElement('pFCPUFFim','2.00' ) // Percentual do ICMS relativo ao Fundo de Combate à pobreza (FCP) na UF de término da prestação do serviço de transporte 2.00% &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSUFFim','18.00' ) // Alíquota interna da UF de término da prestação do serviço de transporte 18.00 &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSInter', '4.00') // Alíquota interestadual das UF envolvidas 4.00 // If year(serverDate()) = 2018 // &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSInterPart','80' ) //Percentual provisório de partilha entre os estados 40% em 2016;- 60% em 2017;- 80% em 2018;- 100% a partir de 2019 // Else // &ArqCte.WriteElement('pICMSInterPart','100' ) // EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vFCPUFFim', '0.00') //Valor do ICMS relativo ao Fundo de Combate á Pobreza (FCP) da UF de término da prestação <vFCPUFFim>0.00</vFCPUFFim> &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSUFFim','0.00' ) // <vICMSUFFim>0.00</vICMSUFFim> &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMSUFIni', '0.00') // <vICMSUFIni>0.00</vICMSUFIni> &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//ICMSUFFim EndIf
//IBS CBS //Valores IBS e CBS &NfeIbsBasVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsBas, 18, 2))
&NfeIbsUfPerVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTax, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsUfVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsUfVlr, 18, 2))
&NfeIbsMunPerVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTax, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeIbsMunVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteIbsMunVlr, 18,2))
&NfeCbsPerVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTax, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsPerRedVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTaxRed, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsPerEfeVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsTaxEfe, 18, 4)) &NfeCbsVlrVarchar = trim(str(CteCbsVlr, 18,2))
&TotalIbsMoeda = CteIbsMunVlr+CteIbsUfVlr &NfeTotalIbsVarchar = trim(Str(&TotalIbsMoeda,18,2))
if (not CteIbsCST.IsEmpty() and not CteIbsCST.IsNull()) and &TCon206_DestacarIbsCbs <> 'N' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('IBSCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CST',trim(CteIbsCST)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cClassTrib',trim(CteIbsClassTrib))
//precisa retornar as configuracoes do ClassTrib &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST = CteIbsCST &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib = CteIbsClassTrib prcRetornaClassTrib_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs)
//Base Calculo if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.Cltind_gIBSCBS = 'S' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',trim(&NfeIbsBasVarchar))
//Ibs UF caso tenha aliquota &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSUF') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pIBSUF',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteIbsUfTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteIbsUfVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteIbsUfTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeIbsUfPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBSUF',&NfeIbsUfVlrVarchar) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSUF
//Ibs Municipio caso tenha &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gIBSMun') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pIBSMun',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteIbsMunTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteIbsMunVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteIbsMunTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeIbsMunPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBSMun', &NfeIbsMunVlrVarchar) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSMun
//valor tota do ibs if CteIbsMunTaxEfe > 0 or CteIbsUfTaxEfe > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vIBS', &NfeTotalIbsVarchar) Endif
//Cbs &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gCBS') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pCBS',trim(&NfeCbsPerVarchar))
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltIsDif = 'S' //Exige Diferimento &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gDif') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pDif',trim(Str(CteCbsTaxDif,18,4))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDif',trim(Str(CteCbsVlrDif,18,2))) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gDif Endif
if CteCbsTaxRed > 0 //caso tenha reducao preencher tags &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gRed') &ArqCte.WriteElement('pRedAliq',trim(&NfeCbsPerRedVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfet',trim(&NfeCbsPerEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gRed Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vCBS',trim(&NfeCbsVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gCBS Endif
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsIsTribReg = 'S' //Exige Tributacao Regular &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('gTribRegular')
&NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUfTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegIbsUfeVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUfVlr, 18,2)) &NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegMunTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegIbsMunVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegMunVlr, 18,2)) &NfeRegCbsTaxEfeVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUnTax, 18,4)) &NfeRegCbsTaxVlrVarchar = trim(Str(CteTribRegUnVlr, 18,2))
&ArqCte.WriteElement('CSTReg',trim(CteTribRegCst)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cClassTribReg',trim(CteTribRegClassTrib)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegIBSUF',trim(&NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegIBSUF',trim(&NfeRegIbsUfeVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegIBSMun',trim(&NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegIBSMun',trim(&NfeRegIbsMunVlrVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('pAliqEfetRegCBS',trim(&NfeRegCbsTaxEfeVarchar)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vTribRegCBS',trim(&NfeRegCbsTaxVlrVarchar))
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gTribRegular Endif
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//gIBSCBS
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//IBSCBS Endif
//ICBSCBS
&Data2026 = YMdtoD(2026,12,31) &vTotDFe = CteVlrTotPreSer if CteDtaEms > &Data2026 &vTotDFe += CteCbsVlr + &TotalIbsMoeda Endif
&ArqCte.WriteElement('vTotDFe', trim(Str(&vTotDFe, 18,2)))
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //imp
Do Case Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCteComp') &ArqCte.WriteElement('chCTe',CteTomChvCpl) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infCteComp
Case CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.anulacao &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCteAnu') &ArqCte.WriteElement('chCte',CteTomChvAnaOri) If not CteTomDtaEmsDec.IsEmpty() &soNumero = str(year(CteTomDtaEmsDec),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(CteTomDtaEmsDec),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(CteTomDtaEmsDec),2,0)),2,'0') //+'T'+trim(serverTime()) +'-'+ trim(FilFusHor) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dEmi',&soNumero) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infCteAnu OtherWise
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCTeNorm') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCarga') &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCarga',CteCarVlrTot) &ArqCte.WriteElement('proPred',trim(CteCarProPre)) If not CteCarOtrCar.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xOutCat',trim(CteCarOtrCar)) EndIf
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infQ') &ArqCte.WriteElement('cUnid',CteCarUnd) &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpMed',CteCarTip) &ArqCte.WriteElement('qCarga',CteCarQtd) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //infQ EndFor If CteCarVlrTotAvb > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCargaAverb',CteCarVlrTotAvb) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infCarga
&ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infDoc') // DOCUMENTOS NFE
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocCod &IsChave = False
Do Case Case CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe iF Not CteDocChvNfe.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infNFe') //3 &IsChave = True
&ArqCte.WriteElement('chave',trim(CteDocChvNfe)) If CteDocPinSuf <> 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('PIN',CteDocPinSuf) EndIf If not CteDocDtaPre.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('dPrev',CteDocDtaPre) EndIf EndIf Case CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infOutros') //3 &ArqCte.WriteElement('tpDoc',CteDocTipOri) If not CteDocDes.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('descOutros',trim(CteDocDes)) EndIf If not CteDocNro.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nDoc',trim(CteDocNro)) EndIf If not CteDocDta.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('dEmi',CteDocDta) EndIf If not CteDocVlrTotPro.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDocFisc',CteDocVlrTotPro) EndIf If not CteDocDtaPre.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('dPrev',CteDocDtaPre) EndIf Case CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infNF') //3 If not CteDocNroRom.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nRoma',trim(CteDocNroRom)) EndIf If not CteDocNroPed.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nPed',trim(CteDocNroPed)) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteElement('mod',CteDocMod) &ArqCte.WriteElement('serie',CteDocSer) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nDoc',CteDocNro) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dEmi',CteDocDta) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBC',CteDocVbc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vICMS',CteDocVlrIcm) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vBCST',CteDocVstIcm) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vST',CteDocVst) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vProd',CteDocVlrTotPro) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vNF',CteDocVlrTotNtf) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nCFOP',CteDocCfoPre) If not CteDocPes.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nPeso',CteDocPes) EndIf
If not CteDocPinSuf.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('PIN',CteDocPinSuf) EndIf
If not CteDocDtaPre.IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('dPrev',CteDocDtaPre) EndIf EndCase
If (CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe and &IsChave = True) or &IsChave = False &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //InfNFE EndiF EndFor
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//InfDoc
If CtePosDocAnt = Status_SimNao.Sim For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocAntCod &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('docAnt') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('emiDocAnt') If not CteDocAntCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDocAntCnpj))) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',Trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDocAntCpf))) EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteDocAntIns))) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteDocAntUf) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xNome',trim(CteDocAntRaz)) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('idDocAnt') &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('idDocAntEle') &ArqCte.WriteElement('chCTe',trim(CteDocAntChv)) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//idDocAntEle &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//idDocAnt &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//emiDocAnt &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//docAnt EndFor EndIf
&seg = 1 If CteModCod = '67' // SO TEM SEGURO NO LAYOUT DE SERVIÇO For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteSegCod If &seg = 1 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('seg') //Informações de Seguro da Carga &seg = 2 EndIf
&ArqCte.WriteElement('respSeg',CteSegCod) If not CteSegNom.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('xSeg',CteSegNom) EndIf If not CteSegApl.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nApol',CteSegApl) EndIf If not CteSegAbr.Trim().IsEmpty() &ArqCte.WriteElement('nAver',CteSegAbr) EndIf If CteSeqVlrCar > 0 &ArqCte.WriteElement('vCarga',CteSeqVlrCar) EndIf EndFor
If &seg = 2 &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//seg EndIf EndIf
Do Case Case CteMod = ModalCte.Rodoviario and CteModCod = '57' &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infModal') &ArqCte.Writeattribute('versaoModal',&versao) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('rodo') &ArqCte.WriteElement('RNTRC',CteModRodRNTRC) // &ArqCte.WriteElement('dPrev',CteModRodDtaPrv) // &ArqCte.WriteElement('lota',CteModRodLot) // If CteModRodCiot > 0 // &ArqCte.WriteElement('CIOT',CteModRodCiot) // EndIf
If CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Sim &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('occ') For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteColCod
&ArqCte.WriteElement('serie',CteColOcc) &ArqCte.WriteElement('nOcc',CteColNum) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dEmi',CteColDta) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('emiOcc') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',CteColCnpj) &ArqCte.WriteElement('cInt',CteColCodInt) &ArqCte.WriteElement('IE',CteColIe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('UF',CteColUfe) &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',CteColFon) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//emiOcc
EndFor &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//occ EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//rodo &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infModal EndCase
//veicNovos 2 informações dos veículos transportados
If CteFatVlr > 0 &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('cobr') //COBRANÇA FATURAS &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('fat') &ArqCte.WriteElement('nFat',CteFatNro) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vOrig',CteFatVlr) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDesc',CteFatVlrDes) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vLiq',CteFatVlrLiq) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//fat
If CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod, CteDupCod &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('dup') &ArqCte.WriteElement('nDup',CteDupNro) &ArqCte.WriteElement('dVenc',CteDupDtaVct) &ArqCte.WriteElement('vDup',CteDupVlr) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//dup EndFor Endif &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//cobr EndIf
If CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infCteSub') &ArqCte.WriteElement('chCte',CteTomChvAnaOri) &ArqCte.WriteElement('indAlteraToma',CteTomIndAlt) &ArqCte.WriteEndElement() //infCteSub
EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//InfCTeNor EndCase
If Not FilCtaCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() and FilCtaCnpj <> &FilCpj and FilCtaCnpj <> CteRemCnpj and FilCtaCnpj <> CteDesCnpj
&FilCtaCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCtaCnpj) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('autXML') If &FilCtaCnpj.Length() > 11 &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilCtaCnpj) Else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',&FilCtaCnpj) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//autXML EndIf
For each order FilAutXml &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('autXML') &FilAutXml = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilAutXml) If &FilAutXml.Length() > 11 &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilAutXml) else &ArqCte.WriteElement('CPF',&FilAutXml) EndIf &ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//autXML EndFor
ResponsavelTecnico.Call(&CTeChv, &EmpCnpj,&EmpRaz,&EmpEml,&EmpFon, &idCSRT, &hashCSRT) &ArqCte.WriteStartElement('infRespTec') &ArqCte.WriteElement('CNPJ',trim(&EmpCnpj)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('xContato',trim(&EmpRaz)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('email',trim(&EmpEml)) &ArqCte.WriteElement('fone',trim(&EmpFon)) // &ArqCte.WriteElement('idCSRT',trim(&idCSRT)) // &ArqCte.WriteElement('hashCSRT',trim(&hashCSRT))
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infRespTec
//##########################################################################
&ArqCte.WriteEndElement()//infCTe &ArqCte.Close() CteChv = &CteChv
EndFor
commit
If &Transmitir = 'S' RetornaExisteSolicitacaoPendente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_CTE, &IsPendente, &SolCod) if &SolCod.IsEmpty() GravaSolicitacao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_CTE, &PesCod, &SolCod) Endif EndIF
Sub 'GetOutroTomador' &TomPesCpf = '' &TomPesCnpj = '' &TomPesInsEst = '' For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &GetCteTomCod
If PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &TomPesCpf = trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesCpf)) If PesCadPro.Trim() <> 'ISENTO' &TomPesInsEst = trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesCadPro)) EndIf Else &TomPesCnpj = trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesCnpj)) If PesInsEst.Trim() <> 'ISENTO' &TomPesInsEst = trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesInsEst)) Else &TomPesInsEst = PesInsEst EndIf EndIf
&TomPesRaz = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesRaz)) &TomPesFan = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesFan)) &TomPesLog = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesLog)) &TomPesNro = PesNro &TomPesCpl = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesCpl)) &TomPesBai = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesBai)) &TomPesCidCod = PesCidIBGE &TomPesCidNom = trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(PesCidNom)) &TomPesCep = trim(retornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesCep)) &TomPesCidUfeCod = PesCidUfeCod &TomPesCidPaiCod = PesCidPaiCod &TomPesCidPaiNom = PesCidPaiNom
For Each Order PesFonCod &TomPesFonNum = trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesFonNum)) exit EndFor Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'GetFilial' For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilCpj = reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCpj) &FilRaz = substr(trim(FilRaz),1,60) If FilInsEst.Trim() <> 'ISENTO' &FilInsEst = reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilInsEst) Else &FilInsEst = FilInsEst EndIf &FilFan = substr(trim(FilFan),1,60) &FilLog = substr(trim(FilLog),1,60) &FilNro = trim(FilNro) &FilBai = trim(FilBai) &FilCep = trim(reTornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCep)) &FilCpl = FilCpl &FilCidCod = FilCidUfeIbge &FilCidNom = FilCidNom &FilCidUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod &FilFonNum = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilFonNum) Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'atualizaPARMempresa' For Each Order EmpCod, ParFiLCod, ParCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ParCod = &ParCod Where ParFiLCod = &FilCod ParUltCod = &CteNum Exit EndfOR EndSub
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&CteCod, in:&Transmitir, in:&PesCod, inout:&SolCod);
